creator: _jkrow
caption:
It’s loud, it’s smelly, it’s surreal 🥹✨ truly one of the most beautiful and awe inspiring places I’ve ever had the privilege of seeing with my own eyes. 

You can support wildlife protection and conservation on the island by spreading the word or donating to these organizations 🔗 on my profile: 

• South Georgia Heritage Trust (sght.org)
• Friends of South Georgia Island (fosgi.org) 

📍 South Georgia Island on expedition with @lindbladexp

transcription.text: We don't give a damn who you are Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to Mont St-Laurent Everything that I've had, praise the Lord Worship Christ with the best of your portion
